name: GuardClaw
description: Privacy-routing plugin for OpenClaw. Detects and routes sensitive content across three sensitivity tiers (S1 public, S2 private, S3 confidential) using a rule engine, LLM classifier, and S0 prompt injection detection. Keeps your most sensitive data local.
author: Centrase
changelog: v1.3.1 — S0 DeBERTa prompt injection detection layer; short-circuit LLM on high-confidence rule hits (~65% fewer LLM calls); s3Policy toggle in dashboard UI (Local Only / Redact & Forward); hardened 3-stage desensitization pipeline; Australian PII compliance patterns; Discord metadata false-positive fix; LFM2-8B-A1B recommended for detection classifier; Qwen3.5:35b for S3 guard agent.
